chunk_title: About Items Shipped to Companies Not Affiliated with Amazon
source_file: About Items Shipped to Companies No(2).md
chunk:
Shipping items to a third-party company that isn’t affiliated with Amazon may result in complications not covered by Amazon.
Third-party companies that are not affiliated with Amazon include freight forwards, Buyer’s Clubs, third-party warehouses, and re-sellers. Amazon isn't responsible for any loss that occurs to items after the items are delivered to a third-party business and cannot issue refunds or replace these items.
For more information about freight forwarding, go to About Freight Forwarders and Hand Carry. For all other third-party companies:
* If an item arrives from Amazon with damaged packaging, please instruct the third-party company to refuse delivery. We'll issue a refund when the item is returned to Amazon.
* If an item arrives defective or damaged inside the packaging, go to Your Orders to view return options.
* If you received your package, but the item was missing from the box, go to Find a Missing Item from Your Order.
* If you have a missing package that shows as delivered, check with your third-party company. Follow the steps in Find a Missing Package that Shows as Delivered.
Amazon will not engage with a third-party company that did not make a purchase directly from Amazon.
Contact Amazon Customer Service if:
* The carrier delivered the item to the wrong address.
* You ordered a non-returnable item that was shipped in multiple boxes, and you only received a partial shipment.

sample_queries: How does the About Items Shipped to Companies Not Affiliated with Amazon policy work?
What are the rules regarding About Items Shipped to Companies Not Affiliated with Amazon?
Can you explain the details for About Items Shipped to Companies Not Affiliated with Amazon?

chunk:
* Inform the hotel. Let the front desk know that you’re expecting a package.
* Track your package. You can find tracking numbers and delivery updates in Your Orders. Visit the Tracking Your Package Help page for more details.
Amazon cannot issue refunds or replacements for packages that are delivered to a hotel but not received by the customer.
A delivery is considered successful once the package receives a delivery scan at the hotel’s front desk, concierge desk, or designated receiving area. This means Amazon will not provide a replacement or refund for any packages marked as delivered to these hotel locations but later reported missing by the guest.
For all other hotel deliveries where the package is successfully received by the customer, our standard return and refund policies still apply.

chunk_title: Amazon Shipment Updates via Text Updates Terms and Conditions
source_file: Amazon Shipment Updates via Text Up(2).md
chunk:
Amazon.com uses the short code 262966 to share shipment tracking updates.
If you agree to receive tracking updates through Amazon Shipment Updates via Text, you'll receive text messages when your package encounters an exception or delay. Confirm your subscription by replying YES to the subscription confirmation message that Amazon sends you upon signing up for the service.
Message and data rates may apply. Message frequency based on account orders. Text HELP to 262966 for Help. Text STOP to 262966 to cancel. For assistance, contact us.
Our participating carriers include (but aren't limited to): AT&T, SprintPCS, Metro PCS, T-Mobile®, U.S. Cellular®, Verizon Wireless.

chunk:
* Contact the hotel. Ask them about their policies for accepting packages. Confirm whether they need any specific information to ensure that you successfully get your item. Ask about any related fees and how early you can send the item.
* Add details to your address. You can add a new address to your Address Book. You can also add or modify instructions to existing addresses by selecting Add Delivery Instructions or Edit on the desired address. Include the following details:
  * Recipient’s full name (name on the reservation)
  * Name of the hotel
* Check your delivery times. Make sure that your delivery date during checkout matches when you are at the location.

chunk_title: Enable Push Notifications on Your Device
chunk:
For iOS:
* Ensure you have the Amazon app (Go to the App Store and search Amazon)
* Go to Settings > Notifications > Amazon > Allow Notifications
* Turn on “Time Sensitive Notifications” and select all alert options for best notification of delivery
For Android:
* Ensure you have the Amazon app (Go to the App Store and search Amazon)
* Go to Settings > Notifications > App Notifications > Amazon > Turn on
* Turn on “Time Sensitive Notifications” and select all alert options for best notification of delivery

chunk_title: Find a missing item shipped by Amazon
source_file: Find a Missing Item from Your Order(2).md
chunk:
If you received your shipping package and an entire item shipped by Amazon is missing, do the following:
1. Go to Your Orders and check if the missing item is in another shipment.
2. Select Track Package to find the delivery date for the shipment.
3. If there is no tracking information for the missing item, Customer Service will assist you. Otherwise, you can follow the recommendations in this page.

chunk:
Most issues can be fixed quickly. You can check what to do when:
* Order hasn't shipped yet: if you're expecting the package today and there isn't a status update, that's normal. Depending on the carrier, items may ship the same day they're delivered.
* Order is delayed: things like weather and traffic can cause delivery delays. Most late parcels arrive within 48 hours of the estimated delivery date. If the order has already been shipped, you can't cancel it.
* Missing package: if your package shows as delivered but you haven't received it, check the Find a missing package that shows as delivered page.
* Missing items: if you received a package that's missing an item, it may have been shipped separately. Check your orders, then refer to Find a missing item.
* To contact the company that's delivering your package, refer to Contact a carrier.

chunk:
For late guaranteed deliveries, you're eligible to receive a delivery fee refund:
* Go to Your Orders and select your late order.
* Choose Problem with an order, then Shipping or delivery issues, and finally Shipment is late.
* If you have an item with a guaranteed delivery date that wasn't met, we'll provide a refund of the shipping fees.

chunk_title: How we’ll contact you if a delivery is late
chunk:
If Amazon delivers the order, we’ll update your tracking with real-time information about where your package is. We’ll email you when we know there’s a delay. You’ll also find all correspondence in the Message Center.
For orders delivered by a delivery carrier, we’ll still update your Amazon order tracker. Your carrier will have the latest information. Contact your carrier directly for shipping updates. You can also check their website, emails, or mobile app for tracking information.

chunk_title: Orders Sold and Fulfilled by Amazon
chunk:
A tracking number may not be on your order yet because it could still be on the way to the carrier. When the carrier scans your order the first time, you will have tracking details in Your Orders.
If no tracking is available and you need to return or exchange your order, wait for the estimated delivery date to pass. You'll be able to return or replace your order by visiting the Online Returns Center.

chunk_title: Orders Sold and Fulfilled by Third-Party Sellers
chunk:
Seller orders can also be tracked, but only if the seller has shared this information with Amazon and you've chosen a traceable shipping method.
If a Track package option is not available, contact the seller as follows:
1. Go to Your Orders.
2. Find your order in the list.
3. Select Problem with Order.
4. Choose your topic from list displayed.
5. Select Contact Seller.
Allow two days for the seller to respond. In most cases you'll receive a reply sooner.

Manufacturer contact information can be found on the product packaging, in the paperwork included with the product, or by searching the Internet.
If you can't find contact information, or if they can't help, you can return the item. Go to Your Orders and select Return or Replace Items.

chunk:
An undeliverable status occurs for various reasons including, but not limited:
* The shipment sustains damage before or during transit.
* The shipment is detected to contain products with quality issues.
* The shipping address can’t be accessed due to wrong address, missing information, or delivery restrictions (ex: correctional facility) or driver safety concerns due to presence of a dog. Visit Your Addresses to update your shipping addresses and add any delivery preferences. Customize instructions to include access codes, presence of dog, and preferred days of delivery for future orders.
* The shipping label becomes unreadable during transit.
* The carrier makes three unsuccessful attempts to access your delivery address.
* Customer/recipient refuses to accept package from carrier.

chunk_title: Reasons Why Your Tracking Information Is Not Available
chunk:
* Your package has not been scanned by the carrier. Issues like this can happen when shipping volume is high and packages are processed in bulk. Until this first scan, the carrier may not acknowledge receipt of the package.
* There may be a delay in updates to the tracking database.
* Some shipments, such as Standard International shipments, aren't trackable.
* Marketplace sellers don't always provide us with tracking information for their orders.
* The order is a gift. You will receive a gift receipt once the order is delivered. Until that time, the gift purchaser will receive the tracking updates.

chunk:
You can expect a refund within 7 business days after the return is received. Some issuing banks may require an additional 3-5 business days to process a refund.
Visit the Refunds Help page for more information about refunds processing times.
Undeliverable Orders Shipped and Sold by Sellers
If your order is shipped and sold by a third-party seller, contact the seller directly for assistance.
If you’re not satisfied with the seller solution or you don’t hear back from them within two business days, you may be eligible for a refund through Amazon's A-to-z Guarantee.
For more information about third-party sellers, visit Ordering from a Third-Party Seller.

To sign up for or cancel shipment updates via text, or change your phone number:

Note: Shipment updates via text are only available for packages shipped by Amazon.com sellers.

chunk:
You can find tracking numbers and delivery updates in Your Orders.
To get tracking numbers and delivery updates:
* Check Your Orders
* Find the order that you want to track
* Select Track package next to your order
* Select All updates to get:
  * delivery updates
  * tracking numbers
  * 
If you ordered more than one thing, they may have separate delivery dates and tracking info. Some packages, like standard international deliveries, might not be trackable.

chunk:
Third-party sellers at Amazon are independent businesses or individuals that sell their products on Amazon Marketplace. To check if you ordered from a third-party seller, refer to Your Orders and review the seller name.
You can only access tracking information if:
* the third-party seller shares this info with us
* you chose a trackable shipping option
To get help, refer to Contacting a third-party seller.

chunk_title: Turn Off Shipment Updates via Text for a Specific Package
source_file: Turn Off Shipment Updates via Text(2).md
chunk:
You can turn off Shipment Updates via Text for a specific package at any time.
To turn off Shipment Updates via Text for a specific package:
1. Go to Your Orders.
2. Select Track your package for the package for which you want to turn off shipment updates via text. You'll see the option to turn off Shipment Updates via Text for that package.
Note: You may still receive a text message after you unsubscribe, if we sent text messages that haven't reached you.

chunk:
Your delivery status is in Your Orders:
* Arriving: usually followed by a date. Your package is on its way to you
* Out for delivery: your package will be delivered today
* Delivered: your package has been delivered, and might be in your safe space
* Undeliverable: your package couldn't be delivered, and will be returned to Amazon. When we receive it, we'll automatically issue you a refund. Visit the Undeliverable packages help page.

chunk:

When a package is returned as undeliverable, we can't reship it. You can place a new order for the item(s).
To stay on top of delivery changes, consider signing up to receive shipment updates via text message.

chunk: Amazon is committed to making shopping seamless and worry-free. Customers may return eligible items when purchases do not meet expectations or needs change. Most items sold on Amazon.com can be returned within 30 days of delivery for: - Refund - Replacement - Exchange Items must generally be: - In original condition - Unused - Returned with original packaging and accessories Customers should review return eligibility: - On the product detail page before purchase - In Order History after placing an order Eligible items may qualify for: - Free returns - Nearby drop-off locations - Box-free returns - Label-free returns

chunk: A refund is issued after: 1. Amazon or the third-party seller receives the returned item 2. The item is inspected 3. The return is approved Return processing may take: - Up to 30 days under normal conditions - Longer in exceptional situations If additional information is required, Amazon contacts the customer with further instructions. Customers may also use Amazon support resources for: - Missing packages - Refund assistance - Product support - A-to-z Guarantee claims involving third-party sellers

chunk_title: About Customs Regulations for Identity Documents
source_file: About Customs Regulations for Identity Documents.md
chunk:
When you place an order for a product from Amazon.com, Identity Documents (ID information) may be required for customs clearance.
Customs regulations in certain countries require you to provide ID for customs clearance. Amazon safely & securely stores the ID information in order to transmit the information to the carrier and Customs officials. This process allows your packages to clear Customs without additional delay.
When you provide your ID information for an address, the ID information links to that delivery address. We use the information provided for that shipment as well as future shipments to that address. The name on the shipping address must match the name on the provided ID information. If you're shipping to someone other than yourself, add the ID information of the recipient. To edit the ID information linked to a delivery address, go to Your Addresses.

sample_queries: Why do I need to provide my ID for Amazon orders?
Does the name on my ID have to match the shipping address name?
How does Amazon secure my ID information for customs?

chunk_title: Managing and Deleting Saved IDs for Customs
source_file: About Customs Regulations for Identity Documents.md
chunk:
To delete the ID information from your Amazon account, go to Manage saved IDs. We immediately remove the ID information from your saved IDs page and all addresses in your address book. Permanent deletion from the Amazon database can take up to 30 days. If you don't use the ID information over a 90-day period, we automatically delete the ID from Your Account and Amazon systems.
Errors or missing information may cause delays beyond the original delivery date. The carrier may contact you for further information to complete those orders.
Customs offices in some countries and regions require the importer of record (IOR) to provide a particular form of identification (ID) before releasing a shipment. You may be required to provide an ID number (such as national ID), photograph of ID, or other document.

sample_queries: How do I delete my saved ID from my Amazon account?
How long does it take to permanently remove my ID from Amazon?
What happens if my ID information is missing or has errors?

chunk_title: Taiwan Import Real Name Authentication (EZ WAY)
source_file: About Customs Regulations for Identity Documents.md
chunk: Taiwan: Effective January 16th, 2020, Taiwan customs requires real name authentication for individuals importing courier express shipments. To facilitate customs clearance, the recipient must register directly via the Taiwan Customs EZ WAY app on a mobile device to complete the real name authentication process. Shipments without real name authentication and verification may not be accepted for import clearance. For additional detail regarding the import clearance process, you can visit the Taiwan Customs information website.

sample_queries: What is the EZ WAY app for Taiwan customs?
How do I authenticate my real name for Taiwan imports?
Why is my package to Taiwan stuck in customs clearance?

chunk_title: South Korea Personal Customs Clearance Code (PCCC)
source_file: About Customs Regulations for Identity Documents.md
chunk:
South Korea: When importing products into Korea, a Personal Customs Clearance Code (PCCC), provided by the Korea Customs Service is required for the declaration of personal items. You can create or update your PCCC on the Korea Customs Service site or obtain further information.
Note: when ordering on Amazon.com, Korean customers can use their Korean or non-Korean name. When using their Korean name, this name must be an identical match to the name used in their PCCC application (capitalization sensitive). If customers use their non-Korean name to order products on Amazon.com for shipping into Korea, the last 4 digits of the phone number in the Customs entry must match the last 4 digits of the phone number provided in their PCCC registration.

sample_queries: What is a PCCC code for South Korea deliveries?
Does the name on my Amazon account have to match my Korean PCCC name?
How do I register a phone number for South Korea customs clearance?

chunk_title: Customs Identification in Argentina, Bahamas, Cayman Islands, and Thailand
source_file: About Customs Regulations for Identity Documents.md
chunk:
- Argentina: Customers in Argentina must have their CUIL (Código Único de Identificación Laboral) registered with a digital email address on the AFIP site. Without this, shipments cannot be cleared.
- The Bahamas: Customers in The Bahamas must register with the Click2Clear portal to clear shipments at Bahamas customs with a valid photo ID. In addition, customers need to fill out form C44 for couriers to clear the Amazon shipments on behalf of the customer.
- Cayman Islands: Customers in Cayman Islands must register on Cayman Customs Online System. Customers need to enter a TIN number and add DHL International (Cayman) LTD as your agent.
- Thailand: Customers in Thailand must apply for permit through TISI NSW systems. This permit is required for Toys, Electric Appliance, Safety equipment, and Vehicle spare parts. In addition, customers must obtain the LPI (license per invoice) to import medical devices.

sample_queries: How do I clear my Amazon shipment in Argentina using CUIL?
What is Click2Clear registration and form C44 for Bahamas customs?
How do I import toys, medical devices, or electronics to Thailand?

chunk:
You can follow the progress of selected shipped packages in real time on a map.
We'll notify you if you can track your package. To access Amazon Map Tracking, select Track Package from Your Orders or your shipment confirmation email. On the day of delivery, you can see the map when the driver is getting close to you.
If you sign up for delivery alerts on our app, we'll inform you when the map is available to view.
Map tracking allows you to arrange to be at the property when your parcel is due for delivery, or to nominate a safe place for your delivery.
Sometimes, a driver may need to change their route. You'll continue to see the map, but won't see the number of stops. You can still expect your parcel that day.
You must be signed into your Amazon.com account to view the map.
If we're delivering an order to a confidential address, such as a wish list or gift address, we'll disable map tracking to protect the privacy of the recipient.
Note: Some carriers don't use Map Tracking.

sample_queries: How do I see my delivery driver's real-time location on a map?
Why can't I see map tracking for a gift delivery or wish list?
Why did the number of remaining delivery stops disappear on the map?

chunk:
If your package is delivered by Amazon, we may take a Photo on Delivery.
Photo on Delivery shows you that your package is safe on arrival when a package is delivered. The photo shows the location of your package or where your item was delivered. Delivery photos may appear in Track your package in Your Orders.
If you want to view a delivery photo, sign into your Amazon account. We may use delivery photos to:
- Verify delivery location.
- Audit for quality purposes.
- Troubleshoot what happened to a package.

sample_queries: Where can I view the photo taken of my delivered package?
Does Amazon take a picture of packages left at my door?
How does Amazon use Photo on Delivery pictures?

chunk:
Availability alerts let you know when an out-of-stock item is back in stock.
To sign up for availability alerts:
1. Search for the out-of-stock item on Amazon.com.
2. On the product detail page, select Alert me when available (or Email me when available).
3. You'll receive an email notification when the item becomes available for purchase again.
Note: Signing up for an alert doesn't reserve the item. It's available on a first-come, first-served basis once back in stock.

sample_queries: How do I get notified when an out of stock item is back?
Does email me when available reserve the item for me?
Where do I sign up for product restock notifications?

chunk:
To avoid delays, provide error free billing and shipping addresses.
Here are a few tips to keep in mind:
- Your billing address must match the address on your monthly credit card or bank statement.
- Leave fields blank if they don't apply to your address, for example, don't enter 'N/A,' 'Not applicable,' and so on.
- Add information in the correct fields, for example, don't enter city and state information in the Address Line 2 field. Use the city and state fields instead.
- Avoid using accent marks or non-English characters. Our system can't process these characters.
- Don't enter shipping or delivery instructions in the address fields. Amazon, our merchants, and marketplace sellers use a variety of carriers. Therefore, we can't assist with requests for specific shippers.

sample_queries: What should my billing address match?
Can I request a specific shipping carrier in my delivery address?
Why did my order get delayed due to address errors?

chunk_title: Add Business Hours to your Addresses
chunk:
You can add hours of operation when you are shipping your orders to a business facility:
- Go to Your Account
- Select Your Addresses
- Go to the address you want to edit and select Add delivery instructions.
- Make sure your Property type is set to Business.
- Add the hours of operations for the business. You can set separate scheduling options for weekends, weekdays or holidays. You can also add information like access codes or additional delivery instructions.
- Save changes

sample_queries: How do I specify business hours for delivery addresses?
Can I tell Amazon not to deliver to my business on weekends?
How do I add access codes to a business shipping address?

chunk:
You can ship items in a single order to multiple shipping addresses.
To deliver to multiple addresses:
1. Add the items to your shopping cart.
2. Select Checkout.
3. On the shipping address page, select Deliver to multiple addresses.
4. Choose a shipping address for each item, or enter a new address.
5. Select Continue to select your shipping options and complete your payment.

sample_queries: Can I ship different items in the same order to different addresses?
How do I split my order shipping to multiple addresses?
Is it possible to deliver items in one cart to two places?

chunk:
Estimated delivery windows let you know when to expect your delivery on the scheduled day.
When available, the estimated delivery window will show in Your Orders or on the Track Package page. The window is an estimate and may change during transit.
Note: Delivery windows are not guaranteed delivery times. The carrier will still attempt to deliver your package by the end of the day if the window is missed.

sample_queries: Where do I see the estimated delivery time window for my package?
Is the estimated delivery window guaranteed?
What happens if the driver misses the scheduled delivery window?

chunk:
Items 'Fulfilled by Amazon' (FBA) are offered by a third-party seller, but packed and shipped to you from an Amazon Fulfilment Center.
All Amazon standard shipping rates and policies apply to these items when shipped domestically, including free shipping on qualifying orders and premium shipping.
When we ship your order, we indicate the carrier company, shipping date and estimated delivery date on the Your Account page. You can track your package in Your Orders.
Sometimes we will send you the exact product you ordered from the inventory of another seller when it is closer to you (with both sellers' consent, of course). When we do this, we'll notify you in your shipping confirmation email and you can view information about both sellers in your order Invoice, which you can find on Your Orders.
We also handle all customer service and product returns for 'Fulfilled by Amazon' items.

sample_queries: What does Fulfilled by Amazon (FBA) mean?
Who handles returns and customer service for FBA items?
Why does my shipping confirmation invoice show two different sellers?

chunk:
About packaging and packaging programs for Amazon.com.
Amazon and Global Optimism announced The Climate Pledge - a commitment to reach the Paris Agreement 10 years early. We are innovating and investing to be net zero carbon by 2040 and run on 100% renewable energy by 2030. Since 2008, sustainable packaging initiatives including Frustration-Free Packaging programs have eliminated thousands of tons of packaging materials and over 1 billion boxes by promoting easy-to-open, recyclable packaging and shipping products in their own packages without additional shipping boxes.
We listen to our customers to identify new ways to reduce waste, improve manufacturer packaging on items we sell, and innovate on the packaging we use in our fulfillment centers. We gather packaging insights via customer service, online returns, and social media to help us deliver the best possible experience while minimizing waste.
Learn more about our packaging programs. To learn how to minimize your impact on the environment through reuse, refurbishing, and recycling, visit Amazon Second Chance.

sample_queries: What is Amazon's Frustration-Free Packaging program?
How does Amazon reduce packaging waste and boxes?
What is Amazon Second Chance for recycling?

chunk: While our mission is to reduce the amount of packaging required while ensuring products arrive to our customers undamaged, we recognize we don't always get it right. If you have experienced a damaged delivery, please contact us and tell us about your experience. We'll use information collected from your order to help assess both the quality of the item's packaging from the manufacturer, and the choices we made in terms of packaging solutions available at our fulfillment centers. If needed, we'll work to improve the packaging and may even restrict the item from sale until a packaging change is made to ensure that we are delivering a great customer experience.

sample_queries: What should I do if my package arrived damaged due to bad packaging?
Does Amazon check manufacturer packaging quality if items break in transit?
Will Amazon stop selling an item if its packaging is constantly damaged?

chunk:
If your package is missing a packing slip, you can view and print a copy of your order details or invoice online:
1. Go to Your Orders.
2. Find the order for which you need a packing slip.
3. Select Invoice (or Order Details).
4. Select Print Invoice (or Print Packing Slip) to print a copy of your document for returns or records.

sample_queries: How do I get a copy of my packing slip if it is missing?
Can I print an invoice or order details page for returns?
Where is the invoice button in Your Orders?

chunk_title: Secure Delivery with a One-Time Password
source_file: Secure Delivery with a One-Time Password.md
chunk:
Due to the value of some items, a One-Time Password (OTP) is required on delivery for some orders. An OTP adds an extra layer of security to your packages. If an OTP is required, we'll send a six-digit numeric OTP to your registered email address, SMS or WhatsApp on the package delivery day.
You can also find the OTP:
- By selecting Track Package beside the order in Your Orders on the delivery day.
- By checking your registered email, SMS, or WhatsApp messages.
Your OTP is valid until the end of the delivery day.
Read the OTP that you’ve received to the driver in person and not over phone or intercom to receive the package.
Note:
- If you're unable to receive the package, share the OTP with someone you choose, and they can receive the package for you in person. We don't recommend sharing the OTP with an unknown person.
- If no one can receive the package, we'll reattempt the delivery on the next working day.
- Don't add your phone number in the delivery address instructions.
- If you're not available to accept the delivery, ask the driver to reattempt the delivery when you or someone you choose will be at the delivery address.
- If you're not the package recipient or have ordered the item as a gift for someone else, forward the OTP to the recipient. Refer them to these guidelines.

sample_queries: Why does my Amazon delivery require a one-time password (OTP)?
Where do I find the six-digit delivery password on the day of delivery?
Can I give my delivery OTP to a neighbor or friend to pick up the package?

chunk:
We ship orders to correctional facilities, but specific guidelines and restrictions apply:
- Deliveries must be sent via United States Postal Service (USPS) or another carrier authorized by the facility. Some private carriers (like UPS or FedEx) may not be allowed to deliver packages to correctional facilities.
- Packages must not contain restricted items (like tobacco, alcohol, weapons, or specific types of media).
- Make sure to contact the prison facility prior to placing your order to confirm their specific delivery rules, recipient identification formats, and package limit policies.
- If a delivery is refused by the facility, it will be returned to Amazon, and we'll automatically issue a refund for the items.

sample_queries: Can I ship an Amazon order to a prison or correctional facility?
Which shipping carriers are allowed to deliver to prisons?
What happens if a prison facility refuses my delivery?

chunk_title: Ships with other Items in the Cart
source_file: Ships with other Items in the Cart.md
chunk:
When you purchase multiple items in a single order, they may be shipped together in one box or split into multiple packages.
We look at several factors to determine the best shipping method:
- Item locations: if products are in different fulfillment centers, they will ship separately.
- Item sizes and weights: heavy or large items may require separate shipping boxes.
- Estimated delivery dates: if you select different delivery speeds for different items, they will ship separately.
- Shipping method chosen: some shipping options group items to minimize delivery trips.
You can view delivery updates and see if your items are grouped together by visiting Track Package in Your Orders.

sample_queries: Why is my Amazon order arriving in multiple packages on different days?
Can I group all my cart items to ship together in one box?
How does Amazon decide if items in my cart ship separately?

chunk:
Some orders require a signature on delivery to ensure safe arrival. This is common for high-value orders or when requested by the shipper or customer.
If a signature is required, the carrier will request a signature from someone at the delivery address in person.
If no one is available to sign for the package, the carrier will make another attempt to deliver on the next working day. You can also view details and reschedule delivery by selecting Track Package in Your Orders or checking your delivery notification cards left by the carrier.

sample_queries: Do I have to sign in person for my high-value Amazon order?
What happens if I'm not home to sign for my package?
How do I reschedule a delivery that requires a signature?
